field.name: oldPassword
field.title: Your current password
field.help: Current password of the logged in user

field.name: chkPassword
field.title: Confirm new password
field.help: Confirm new password of the user (must be identical to the new password)

field.name: chkPassword
field.title: Confirm password
field.help: Confirm password of the new user (must be identical to the password)

panel.static:
<>
            {_passwordRequirements && _passwordRequirements.length > 0 && (
              <Box
                mb={2}
                rounded
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: "var(--bs-tertiary-bg)",
                  color: "rgba(var(--bs-body-color-rgb), 0.65)",
                  padding: "0.65rem 0.75rem",
                }}
              >
                <Box
                  as="p"
                  mb={1}
                  style={{ fontWeight: 600 }}
                >
                  {_t("Your new password must")}
                </Box>
                <Box
                  as="ul"
                  d="flex"
                  flexDirection="column"
                  style={{ listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: 0, gap: "0.2rem" }}
                >
                  {_passwordRequirements.map((requirement, i) => (
                    <Box
                      as="li"
                      key={i}
                      d="flex"
                      alignItems="center"
                      style={{ gap: "0.25rem" }}
                    >
                      <Icon icon="dot" />
                      {requirement}
                    </Box>
                  ))}
                </Box>
              </Box>
            )}
          </>

label.title: Multi-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security.

field.name: chkPassword
field.title: Confirm new password
field.help: Confirm new password of the user (must be identical to the new password)

panel.static:
<>
            {_passwordRequirements && _passwordRequirements.length > 0 && (
              <Box
                mb={2}
                rounded
                style={{
                  backgroundColor: "var(--bs-tertiary-bg)",
                  color: "rgba(var(--bs-body-color-rgb), 0.65)",
                  padding: "0.65rem 0.75rem",
                }}
              >
                <Box
                  as="p"
                  mb={1}
                  style={{ fontWeight: 600 }}
                >
                  {_t("Your new password must")}
                </Box>
                <Box
                  as="ul"
                  d="flex"
                  flexDirection="column"
                  style={{ listStyle: "none", padding: 0, margin: 0, gap: "0.2rem" }}
                >
                  {_passwordRequirements.map((requirement, i) => (
                    <Box
                      as="li"
                      key={i}
                      d="flex"
                      alignItems="center"
                      style={{ gap: "0.25rem" }}
                    >
                      <Icon icon="dot" />
                      {requirement}
                    </Box>
                  ))}
                </Box>
              </Box>
            )}
            </>

label.title: Multi-Factor Authentication adds an extra layer of security.

check.error: Code length should be greater than 2.
Name length should be greater than 2.
